title: Nephrodium speciosum
taxonomy: Nephrodium speciosum is an extinct genus of ferns that belonged to the family Matoniaaceae. It is also known as the 'Silver Lady' or 'Lady Silver Fern'. The classification of Nephrodium speciosum places it in the division Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, and family Matoniaaceae. The family Matoniaaceae is a small family of ferns that are primarily found in tropical regions of Asia. This classification suggests that Nephrodium speciosum is closely related to other members of the Matoniaaceae family.
